posts.title: Hello World (SSG)
posts.excerpt: A tiny post compiled at build time.
posts.body:
This post comes from `content-src/posts/hello-world.md` and was compiled into JSON during the build step.

In SSG, this content snapshot is what gets deployed. No runtime CMS is required.

posts.title: Build Pipelines Are Your Runtime
posts.excerpt: SSG shifts complexity to the build phase.
posts.body:
SSG turns builds into first-class production systems.

You need determinism, observability, and correctness in your content compilation pipeline.

A flaky build is a production incident.
